title: Frontier Network Cobblemon
description: This modpack includes a bunch of Quality of Life mods to improve gameplay, and some amazing resource packs
body:
This modpack is designed to be used on the Frontier Network cobblemon server. It contains mods reccomended to use on the server to enhance your enjoyment! Both QOL mods and required mods are provided.

Frontier is a server with an amazing community and stuff, we have custom in game addons like poke editor, wonder trade, secret bases for you to build to your hearts extent, custom pokemon that spawn in the wild, and some available throught custom crates.

Download the modpack and come join us at play.frontier-mc.com!
